notes: Immortal 1.19 — the screensaver no longer bounces back to the launcher. Meta's power manager force-wakes any screensaver ~2 minutes in; Immortal now catches that and keeps the photo frame up permanently. On the Portal Go a new 'Pause screensaver on battery' setting (on by default) lets the device truly sleep when unplugged. Re-run the provisioning kit once to disable Meta's presence detector, which was also keeping devices awake all night.
